commands.review_summary:
The PR adds pre-normalization quarantine for provider-hostile runtime tool schemas in assistant attempts and compaction, reserves quarantined active tool names, and adds focused schema/runtime coverage.

PR surface: Source +140, Tests +262. Total +402 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main normalizes raw active and bundled tool schemas before quarantine in both assistant attempts and compaction, so a circular schema can fail before diagnostics.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to accept the quarantine-vs-abort runtime compatibility behavior; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

Quarantine active runtime tools whose schemas cannot safely reach provider/runtime schema projection, including assistant-turn startup and compaction.

This also covers the earlier tool-parameter normalization boundary: schemas that are not JSON-serializable are left untouched by schema normalization so the runtime quarantine path can omit and report them instead of crashing before diagnostics.

Healthy sibling tools continue. Quarantined active tool names remain reserved for bundled MCP/LSP materialization, so a bundled tool cannot silently reuse the name of an omitted active tool.

The test fixtures use neutral `fuzzplugin` / `mockplugin` names. The branch was pruned after review to keep the PR focused: current diff is 12 files, +464/-62.

## Verification

- Rebased onto current `origin/main` `85beee613c64`; pushed head `aa3f69b3a805`.
- GitHub PR checks on head `aa3f69b3a805`: 148/148 completed, no failures, no pending checks.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.schema.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts`: passed 2 shards / 166 tests in 19.03s after the latest rebase.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check` across all 12 PR files: passed after the latest rebase.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` across all 12 PR files: passed after the latest rebase.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed after the latest rebase.
- Changed-file scrub for the originally reported fixture name and private local paths: clean.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings; overall patch correct before the final non-overlap rebase.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: passed before the final non-overlap rebase on provider `aws`, run `run_65720dae1af6`, lease `cbx_c33c27f561d5` / `golden-barnacle`, type `c7a.8xlarge`, command 8m33s, total 10m49s, lanes `core` and `coreTests`, exit 0, lease stopped=true.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: A single active tool with a schema that cannot survive provider/runtime schema projection is quarantined before assistant session creation instead of crashing the whole assistant turn.

Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest/format/lint/review proof through repo wrappers; remote Linux changed gate through AWS Crabbox; GitHub PR CI.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.

Evidence after fix: Focused runner coverage shows session creation receives only healthy sibling tools when an active tool has an unsupported or non-serializable schema. Schema-normalizer coverage verifies non-JSON-serializable schemas are left for runtime quarantine instead of crashing early. Attempt and compaction coverage verifies quarantined active names remain reserved for bundled MCP/LSP runtimes. Remote `pnpm check:changed` passed the affected `core` and `coreTests` lanes before the final non-overlap rebase, and GitHub PR checks are fully green on the latest head.

Observed result after fix: Healthy tools continue; active bad tools are reported through the existing trusted diagnostic/quarantine path; bundled tools cannot take over quarantined active names.

What was not tested: Live provider calls.
target.author: vincentkoc
